history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man stands in a hallway, leaning against a wall. He is wearing a dark navy blue long-sleeved shirt and dark wash denim jeans. His head is bowed, and his dark hair falls forward, obscuring his face. The wall behind him is divided into two distinct textures. The left side features a wall covered in small, square, shimmering mosaic tiles in shades of brown and gold, arranged in a grid pattern. A dark brown wooden trim frames this tiled section. The right side of the wall is a plain, textured surface in a light beige or cream color, with subtle vertical lines. The lighting is soft and ambient, casting a gentle shadow from the man onto the beige wall. The overall mood is contemplative and slightly moody, with a warm, earthy color palette dominated by browns, golds, and dark blues. The composition is a medium shot, focusing on the man and the contrasting textures of the wall.
